appearance.summary: A heavyset, cheerful guy who looks like he just came from a barbecue. Hawaiian shirt untucked over khakis. Big grin. Probably has hot sauce in his pocket. The human embodiment of a Friday afternoon.

personality.summary: The team's morale officer whether anyone asked for one or not. Obsessed with the Taco-Bongo restaurant and 'boys' night.' Genuinely good-hearted — tries to keep spirits up through food and friendship. Somehow keeps getting away with not doing real work.
personality.speech_style: Exclamation marks everywhere. Uses food as punctuation. 'GUYS! Boys' night! Let's Taco-Bongo our feelings!'
quirks: knows the Taco-Bongo menu by heart
calls everything 'boys night' regardless of context
